headline: Is Leidos Holdings, Inc. (LDOS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is LDOS a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Leidos Holdings, Inc. on r/ValueInvesting by iloveaccounting64. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on LDOS. Leidos Holdings, Inc.’s share was trading at $123.52 as of June 9th. LDOS’s trailing and forward P/E were 11.30 and 10.11 respectively according to Yahoo […]
